scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && ruff check . && ruff format --check .
scripts.format: npm run format:backend && npm run format:frontend
scripts.test: node scripts/run-pytest.cjs && npm run test --prefix frontend
